---
title: "Chapter 2: Advanced Topics"
---

# Chapter 2: Advanced Topics

This is the second chapter, also shared between the website and book formats.

## Advanced Features

Quarto supports many advanced features:

### Callout Blocks

::: {.callout-note}
This is a note callout block.
:::

::: {.callout-warning}
This is a warning callout block.
:::

### Tables

| Feature | Website | Book |
|---------|---------|------|
| HTML Output | ✓ | ✓ |
| PDF Output | ✗ | ✓ |
| Interactive Elements | ✓ | Limited |
| Print-friendly | ✗ | ✓ |

### Figures

You can include figures that work in both formats:

```python
# Example Python code for plotting
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

x = np.linspace(0, 10, 100)
y = np.sin(x)

plt.figure(figsize=(8, 4))
plt.plot(x, y)
plt.title("Sine Wave")
plt.xlabel("x")
plt.ylabel("sin(x)")
plt.grid(True)
plt.show()
```

*Note: This is a code example. In a real project with proper Python/Jupyter setup, this would generate a sine wave plot.*

## Conclusion

This demonstrates how content can be shared between website and book formats while maintaining appropriate styling for each.
